sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_test (id UInt32, location Nullable(String), value Float32);
INSERT INTO geo_test VALUES (1, 'POINT (1 2)', 10.5), (2, NULL, NULL), (3, 'POINT (-1 -2)', 20.0);
SELECT id, readWKTPoint(location) AS point, value FROM geo_test WHERE location IS NULL;
SELECT id, readWKTPoint(location) AS point FROM geo_test WHERE readWKTPoint(location) IS NULL;
SELECT id, readWKTPoint(location) AS point FROM geo_test WHERE value IS NULL AND location IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, readWKTPoint(location) AS point, value FROM geo_test WHERE value > 0 OR location IS NULL;
WITH (SELECT id FROM geo_test WHERE location IS NOT NULL) AS non_null_ids SELECT readWKTPoint(location) FROM geo_test WHERE id IN non_null_ids;
CREATE TABLE all_test (id UInt32, location Nullable(String), value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO all_test VALUES (1, 'POINT (0 0)', 1.55), (2, 'POINT (100 200)', 2.75), (3, NULL, NULL);
SELECT a.id, readWKTPoint(a.location) AS point_a, readWKTPoint(b.location) AS point_b FROM geo_test AS a JOIN all_test AS b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.location IS NOT NULL OR b.value IS NULL;
SELECT id, readWKTPoint(location) AS point FROM geo_test GROUP BY id HAVING IS NULL(value) = 1;
SELECT id, SUM(value) OVER (PARTITION BY value ORDER BY id) AS running_total FROM geo_test WHERE readWKTPoint(location) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, readWKTPoint(location) AS point FROM geo_test WHERE readWKTPoint(location) IS NOT NULL AND (location IS NOT NULL OR value < 0.5);
ALTER TABLE all_test ADD COLUMN new_value Nullable(Int32);
UPDATE all_test SET new_value = 1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
